inputs.experiment_spec: Test: Subject line personalization impact on cold email open rates. Variant A: Generic industry reference ('Scaling [Industry] operations with AI'). Variant B: Company-specific reference ('How [Company] can automate [specific pain point]'). Variant C: Mutual connection reference ('Noticed we both know [connection]'). Success metric: open rate and reply rate. Sample size per variant: 100 sends. Duration: 7 days.
